## `server/atlasCertification.ts`

```typescript
/**
 * Atlas Incident Certification Service
 * Generates professional HTML certification documents with QR codes
 * for Atlas breach incidents (110 real Saudi breach incidents from breachRawData.json)
 */
import crypto from "crypto";
import QRCode from "qrcode";
import { RASID_LOGO_DARK_BASE64, RASID_LOGO_LIGHT_BASE64 } from "./logoBase64";

const RASID_LOGO_DARK_BG = RASID_LOGO_DARK_BASE64;
const RASID_LOGO_LIGHT_BG = RASID_LOGO_LIGHT_BASE64;

// ─── Utility Functions ───────────────────────────────────────
export function generateVerificationCode(): string {
  const year = new Date().getFullYear();
  const random = crypto.randomBytes(4).toString("hex").toUpperCase();
  return `NDMO-ATL-${year}-${random}`;
}

export function generateDocumentId(): string {
  return `ATL-DOC-${Date.now()}-${crypto.randomBytes(3).toString("hex").toUpperCase()}`;
}

export function generateContentHash(content: string): string {
  return crypto.createHash("sha256").update(content).digest("hex");
}

async function generateQRCode(data: string): Promise<string> {
  return QRCode.toDataURL(data, {
    width: 200,
    margin: 2,
    color: { dark: "#0a2540", light: "#ffffff" },
    errorCorrectionLevel: "H",
  });
}

// ─── Severity Labels ─────────────────────────────────────────
const severityLabels: Record<string, { ar: string; en: string; color: string; bg: string }> = {
  Critical: { ar: "عالية الأهمية", en: "Critical", color: "#dc2626", bg: "#dc26261a" },
  High: { ar: "عالية", en: "High", color: "#ea580c", bg: "#ea580c1a" },
  Medium: { ar: "متوسطة", en: "Medium", color: "#d97706", bg: "#d977061a" },
  Low: { ar: "منخفضة", en: "Low", color: "#0d9488", bg: "#0d94881a" },
  Informational: { ar: "إعلامية", en: "Informational", color: "#6366f1", bg: "#6366f11a" },
};

// ─── Atlas Incident Interface ────────────────────────────────
export interface AtlasIncident {
  id: string;
  victim: string;
  title_en: string;
  title_ar: string;
  date: string;
  category: string;
  sector: string;
  threat_actor: string;
  description_en: string;
  description_ar: string;
  overview: {
    discovery_date: string;
    attack_method: string;
    attack_method_ar: string;
    exposed_records: number;
    data_size: string;
    source_platform: string;
    source_url: string;
    severity: string;
    confidence_level: string;
  };
  attacker_info: {
    alias: string;
    price_usd: number;
    price_display: string;
    platform: string;
    group: string;
    known_attacks: string;
  };
  data_types: string[];
  data_types_ar: string[];
  data_types_count: number;
  data_sensitivity: string;
  ai_analysis: {
    analysis_date: string;
    impact_assessment: string;
    confidence_percentage: number;
    executive_summary: string;
    recommendations: string[];
  };
  pdpl_analysis: {
    violated_articles: string;
    estimated_fine_sar: string;
    risk_level: string;
  };
  evidence_images?: string[];
  leak_source?: {
    sector?: string;
    region?: string;
    region_en?: string;
    original_url?: string;
  };
  sources?: Array<{ name: string; url: string }>;
}

// ─── Result Interface ────────────────────────────────────────
export interface AtlasCertificationResult {
  documentId: string;
  verificationCode: string;
  contentHash: string;
  htmlContent: string;
  incidentId: string;
  title: string;
  titleAr: string;
  generatedAt: string;
}

// ─── Main Generation Function ────────────────────────────────
export async function generateAtlasCertification(
  incident: AtlasIncident,
  generatedByName: string,
  verifyBaseUrl: string
): Promise<AtlasCertificationResult> {
  const documentId = generateDocumentId();
  const verificationCode = generateVerificationCode();
  const generatedAt = new Date().toISOString();
  const generatedAtFormatted = new Date().toLocaleString("ar-SA", {
    year: "numeric",
    month: "long",
    day: "numeric",
    hour: "2-digit",
    minute: "2-digit",
    second: "2-digit",
    timeZone: "Asia/Riyadh",
  });
  const hijriDate = new Date().toLocaleDateString("ar-SA-u-ca-islamic", {
    year: "numeric",
    month: "long",
    day: "numeric",
  });

  const verifyUrl = `${verifyBaseUrl}/public/verify/${verificationCode}`;
  const qrDataUrl = await generateQRCode(verifyUrl);

  // Severity info
  const severity = severityLabels[incident.overview.severity] || severityLabels.Medium;

  // Build content for hashing
  const contentForHash = JSON.stringify({
    documentId,
    verificationCode,
    incidentId: incident.id,
    title: incident.title_ar,
    severity: incident.overview.severity,
    recordCount: incident.overview.exposed_records,
    generatedAt,
    generatedByName,
  });
  const contentHash = generateContentHash(contentForHash);

  // PII types badges
  const piiList = (incident.data_types_ar || [])
    .map(
      (t) =>
        `<span style="display:inline-block;background:#f1f5f9;color:#0a2540;border:1px solid #e2e8f0;border-radius:6px;padding:4px 12px;margin:3px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;">${t}</span>`
    )
    .join("");

  // Evidence screenshots
  const screenshotSection = (incident.evidence_images || [])
    .slice(0, 4)
    .map(
      (url) =>
        `<img src="${url}" style="width:47%;border-radius:8px;border:2px solid #e2e8f0;margin:4px;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.06);" />`
    )
    .join("");

  // AI Analysis section
  const aiSection = incident.ai_analysis?.executive_summary
    ? `
    <div style="background:#f8fafc;border:1px solid #e2e8f0;border-radius:12px;padding:20px;margin-top:24px;page-break-inside:avoid;">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:12px;">
        <div style="width:4px;height:24px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#0d9488,#06b6d4);border-radius:2px;"></div>
        <h3 style="color:#0a2540;font-size:15px;margin:0;font-weight:800;">تحليل الذكاء الاصطناعي ${incident.ai_analysis.confidence_percentage ? `<span style="font-size:11px;color:#0d9488;font-weight:500;margin-right:8px;">(نسبة الثقة: ${incident.ai_analysis.confidence_percentage}%)</span>` : ""}</h3>
      </div>
      <p style="font-size:12px;color:#334155;line-height:2.2;text-align:right;margin:0;">${incident.ai_analysis.executive_summary}</p>
      ${
        incident.ai_analysis.recommendations && incident.ai_analysis.recommendations.length > 0
          ? `<div style="margin-top:14px;padding-top:14px;border-top:1px solid #e2e8f0;">
             <h4 style="color:#0a2540;font-size:12px;margin:0 0 10px 0;text-align:right;font-weight:700;">التوصيات:</h4>
             <ul style="margin:0;padding:0;list-style:none;">
               ${incident.ai_analysis.recommendations.map((r) => `<li style="font-size:11px;color:#334155;margin:8px 0;text-align:right;padding-right:14px;border-right:3px solid #0d9488;line-height:1.8;">${r}</li>`).join("")}
             </ul>
           </div>`
          : ""
      }
    </div>`
    : "";

  // PDPL Analysis section
  const pdplSection = incident.pdpl_analysis
    ? `
    <div style="background:#fffbeb;border:1px solid #fde68a;border-radius:12px;padding:20px;margin-top:24px;page-break-inside:avoid;">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:12px;">
        <div style="width:4px;height:24px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#d97706,#f59e0b);border-radius:2px;"></div>
        <h3 style="color:#0a2540;font-size:15px;margin:0;font-weight:800;">تحليل نظام حماية البيانات الشخصية (PDPL)</h3>
      </div>
      <table style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;direction:rtl;">
        <tr>
          <td style="padding:10px 14px;font-size:12px;color:#64748b;font-weight:600;width:35%;border-bottom:1px solid #fde68a;">المواد المنتهكة</td>
          <td style="padding:10px 14px;font-size:12px;color:#92400e;font-weight:700;border-bottom:1px solid #fde68a;">${incident.pdpl_analysis.violated_articles}</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
          <td style="padding:10px 14px;font-size:12px;color:#64748b;font-weight:600;border-bottom:1px solid #fde68a;">الغرامات التقديرية</td>
          <td style="padding:10px 14px;font-size:12px;color:#dc2626;font-weight:800;border-bottom:1px solid #fde68a;">${incident.pdpl_analysis.estimated_fine_sar} ريال</td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
          <td style="padding:10px 14px;font-size:12px;color:#64748b;font-weight:600;">مستوى المخاطر</td>
          <td style="padding:10px 14px;font-size:12px;color:#92400e;font-weight:700;">${incident.pdpl_analysis.risk_level}</td>
        </tr>
      </table>
    </div>`
    : "";

  // Sources section
  const sourcesSection = (incident.sources && incident.sources.length > 0)
    ? `
    <div style="margin-top:24px;page-break-inside:avoid;">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:14px;">
        <div style="width:4px;height:24px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#6366f1,#8b5cf6);border-radius:2px;"></div>
        <h3 style="color:#0a2540;font-size:15px;margin:0;font-weight:800;">مصادر التحقق</h3>
      </div>
      <table style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;direction:rtl;border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden;border:1px solid #e2e8f0;">
        <tr>
          <th style="padding:10px 14px;border:1px solid #e2e8f0;font-size:10px;text-align:right;background:#f1f5f9;color:#0a2540;font-weight:700;">#</th>
          <th style="padding:10px 14px;border:1px solid #e2e8f0;font-size:10px;text-align:right;background:#f1f5f9;color:#0a2540;font-weight:700;">المصدر</th>
          <th style="padding:10px 14px;border:1px solid #e2e8f0;font-size:10px;text-align:right;background:#f1f5f9;color:#0a2540;font-weight:700;">الرابط</th>
        </tr>
        ${incident.sources.slice(0, 6).map((s, i) => `
          <tr style="background:${i % 2 === 0 ? "#fff" : "#f8fafc"}">
            <td style="padding:8px 14px;border:1px solid #e2e8f0;font-size:11px;text-align:right;font-weight:700;">${i + 1}</td>
            <td style="padding:8px 14px;border:1px solid #e2e8f0;font-size:11px;text-align:right;">${s.name}</td>
            <td style="padding:8px 14px;border:1px solid #e2e8f0;font-size:10px;text-align:right;font-family:'Courier New',monospace;color:#6366f1;word-break:break-all;">${s.url}</td>
          </tr>`).join("")}
      </table>
    </div>`
    : "";

  // ─── Build the full HTML document ───────────────────────────
  const htmlContent = `<!DOCTYPE html>
<html dir="rtl" lang="ar">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Tajawal:wght@300;400;500;700;800;900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
  <style>
    * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
    body {
      font-family: 'Tajawal', 'Noto Kufi Arabic', sans-serif;
      background: #fff;
      color: #1e293b;
      direction: rtl;
      -webkit-print-color-adjust: exact !important;
      print-color-adjust: exact !important;
    }
    .page { max-width: 820px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0; position: relative; }
    @page { size: A4; margin: 8mm; }
    @media print {
      body { -webkit-print-color-adjust: exact !important; }
      .page { padding: 0; max-width: 100%; }
      .no-print { display: none !important; }
    }
    .info-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; direction: rtl; border-radius: 10px; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; }
    .info-table td { padding: 11px 18px; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; font-size: 12px; text-align: right; vertical-align: middle; }
    .info-table .label-cell { background: #f8fafc; color: #64748b; width: 32%; font-weight: 600; }
    .info-table .value-cell { font-weight: 600; color: #0f172a; }
    .badge { display: inline-block; border-radius: 6px; padding: 4px 14px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
  <div class="page">

    <!-- WATERMARK -->
    <div style="position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;bottom:0;pointer-events:none;z-index:0;overflow:hidden;">
      <div style="position:absolute;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%) rotate(-35deg);white-space:nowrap;">
        <div style="font-size:72px;font-weight:900;color:rgba(220,38,38,0.035);letter-spacing:20px;line-height:200px;">
          سري جداً &nbsp; TOP SECRET &nbsp; سري جداً<br/>
          TOP SECRET &nbsp; سري جداً &nbsp; TOP SECRET<br/>
          سري جداً &nbsp; TOP SECRET &nbsp; سري جداً
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- TOP CLASSIFICATION BANNER -->
    <div style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#7f1d1d,#991b1b,#b91c1c);padding:10px 24px;text-align:center;position:relative;z-index:1;">
      <p style="color:#fecaca;font-size:12px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:4px;margin:0;">
        سري جداً — TOP SECRET — تصنيف: مقيّد
      </p>
    </div>

    <!-- DOCUMENT HEADER -->
    <div style="background:linear-gradient(180deg,#0a2540 0%,#0c3054 100%);padding:28px 36px;position:relative;z-index:1;">
      <div style="position:absolute;inset:0;opacity:0.04;background-image:repeating-linear-gradient(45deg,transparent,transparent 30px,rgba(255,255,255,1) 30px,rgba(255,255,255,1) 31px);pointer-events:none;"></div>
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;position:relative;z-index:1;">
        <div style="text-align:right;flex:1;">
          <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;margin-bottom:8px;">
            <img src="${RASID_LOGO_DARK_BG}" alt="منصة راصد" style="height:56px;object-fit:contain;" />
            <div style="width:1px;height:40px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.15);"></div>
            <div>
              <p style="font-size:14px;color:white;font-weight:800;margin:0;">منصة راصد الوطنية — أطلس حالات الرصد</p>
              <p style="font-size:10px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);margin:3px 0 0 0;">NDMO Rasid Platform — Atlas Incident Certification</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div style="text-align:left;">
          <div style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.06);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12);border-radius:12px;padding:14px 18px;">
            <p style="font-size:9px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);margin:0;">رقم الوثيقة</p>
            <p style="font-size:13px;color:white;font-family:'Courier New',monospace;font-weight:800;margin:4px 0 0 0;letter-spacing:0.5px;">${documentId}</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Document meta bar -->
      <div style="display:flex;gap:12px;margin-top:18px;padding-top:18px;border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);flex-wrap:wrap;position:relative;z-index:1;">
        <div style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.05);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);border-radius:8px;padding:10px 14px;flex:1;min-width:130px;">
          <p style="font-size:9px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);margin:0;">تاريخ الإصدار (ميلادي)</p>
          <p style="font-size:11px;color:white;font-weight:700;margin:3px 0 0 0;">${generatedAtFormatted}</p>
        </div>
        <div style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.05);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);border-radius:8px;padding:10px 14px;flex:1;min-width:130px;">
          <p style="font-size:9px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);margin:0;">تاريخ الإصدار (هجري)</p>
          <p style="font-size:11px;color:white;font-weight:700;margin:3px 0 0 0;">${hijriDate}</p>
        </div>
        <div style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.05);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);border-radius:8px;padding:10px 14px;flex:1;min-width:130px;">
          <p style="font-size:9px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);margin:0;">صادر بواسطة</p>
          <p style="font-size:11px;color:white;font-weight:700;margin:3px 0 0 0;">${generatedByName}</p>
        </div>
        <div style="background:rgba(220,38,38,0.15);border:1px solid rgba(220,38,38,0.3);border-radius:8px;padding:10px 14px;">
          <p style="font-size:9px;color:#fca5a5;margin:0;">التصنيف</p>
          <p style="font-size:12px;color:#fecaca;font-weight:900;margin:3px 0 0 0;">سري جداً</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- DOCUMENT TITLE -->
    <div style="padding:26px 36px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f0fdf4,#ecfdf5,#f0f9ff);border-bottom:2px solid #e2e8f0;position:relative;z-index:1;">
      <div style="text-align:center;">
        <h2 style="font-size:21px;font-weight:900;color:#0a2540;margin:0;">شهادة توثيق حالة رصد</h2>
        <p style="font-size:11px;color:#64748b;margin-top:5px;font-weight:500;">Atlas Personal Data Monitoring Case Certification</p>
        <div style="width:60px;height:3px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#0d9488,#06b6d4);margin:14px auto 0;border-radius:2px;"></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- CONTENT BODY -->
    <div style="padding:28px 36px;position:relative;z-index:1;">

      <!-- Incident Overview Table -->
      <div style="margin-bottom:28px;">
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:16px;">
          <div style="width:4px;height:26px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#0a2540,#0d9488);border-radius:2px;"></div>
          <h3 style="color:#0a2540;font-size:16px;margin:0;font-weight:900;">معلومات حالة الرصد</h3>
        </div>
        <table class="info-table">
          <tr>
            <td class="label-cell">رقم حالة الرصد</td>
            <td class="value-cell" style="font-family:'Courier New',monospace;color:#6366f1;font-weight:800;">${incident.id}</td>
          </tr>
          <tr>
            <td class="label-cell">عنوان حالة الرصد</td>
            <td class="value-cell" style="font-size:13px;font-weight:800;color:#0a2540;">${incident.title_ar}</td>
          </tr>
          <tr>
            <td class="label-cell">الجهة المتضررة</td>
            <td class="value-cell" style="font-weight:700;">${incident.victim}</td>
          </tr>
          <tr>
            <td class="label-cell">تصنيف مستوى التأثير</td>
            <td class="value-cell">
              <span class="badge" style="background:${severity.bg};color:${severity.color};border:1px solid ${severity.color}33;">${severity.ar} — ${severity.en}</span>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr>
            <td class="label-cell">القطاع</td>
            <td class="value-cell" style="font-weight:700;">${incident.sector}</td>
          </tr>
          <tr>
            <td class="label-cell" style="color:#dc2626;font-weight:700;">السجلات المكشوفة (العينات المتاحة)</td>
            <td class="value-cell" style="font-size:15px;font-weight:900;color:#dc2626;background:#fef2f2;">${(incident.overview.total_sample_records || 0).toLocaleString()}</td>
          </tr>
          <tr>
            <td class="label-cell">العدد المُدّعى</td>
            <td class="value-cell" style="font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:#0d9488;">${incident.overview.exposed_records.toLocaleString()}</td>
          </tr>
          <tr>
            <td class="label-cell">حجم البيانات</td>
            <td class="value-cell">${incident.overview.data_size}</td>
          </tr>
          <tr>
            <td class="label-cell">المنصة المصدر</td>
            <td class="value-cell">${incident.overview.source_platform}</td>
          </tr>
          <tr>
            <td class="label-cell">أسلوب الهجوم</td>
            <td class="value-cell">${incident.overview.attack_method_ar || incident.overview.attack_method}</td>
          </tr>
          ${incident.attacker_info?.alias ? `<tr><td class="label-cell">الجهة الفاعلة / البائع</td><td class="value-cell" style="color:#dc2626;font-weight:800;">${incident.attacker_info.alias}</td></tr>` : ""}
          ${incident.attacker_info?.price_display ? `<tr><td class="label-cell">السعر المعروض</td><td class="value-cell" style="font-weight:700;">${incident.attacker_info.price_display}</td></tr>` : ""}
          ${incident.attacker_info?.platform ? `<tr><td class="label-cell">منصة العرض</td><td class="value-cell">${incident.attacker_info.platform}</td></tr>` : ""}
          ${incident.leak_source?.region ? `<tr><td class="label-cell">المنطقة</td><td class="value-cell">${incident.leak_source.region}</td></tr>` : ""}
          <tr>
            <td class="label-cell">تاريخ الرصد</td>
            <td class="value-cell">${incident.date ? new Date(incident.date).toLocaleDateString("ar-SA", { year: "numeric", month: "long", day: "numeric" }) : "—"}</td>
          </tr>
          <tr>
            <td class="label-cell">مستوى الثقة</td>
            <td class="value-cell">${incident.overview.confidence_level}%</td>
          </tr>
        </table>
      </div>

      <!-- Description -->
      ${incident.description_ar ? `
      <div style="margin-bottom:28px;page-break-inside:avoid;">
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:16px;">
          <div style="width:4px;height:26px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#0a2540,#0d9488);border-radius:2px;"></div>
          <h3 style="color:#0a2540;font-size:16px;margin:0;font-weight:900;">وصف حالة الرصد</h3>
        </div>
        <p style="font-size:12px;color:#334155;line-height:2.2;text-align:right;background:#f8fafc;padding:20px;border-radius:10px;border:1px solid #e2e8f0;">${incident.description_ar}</p>
      </div>` : ""}

      <!-- PII Types -->
      <div style="margin-bottom:28px;page-break-inside:avoid;">
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:16px;">
          <div style="width:4px;height:26px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#dc2626,#ea580c);border-radius:2px;"></div>
          <h3 style="color:#0a2540;font-size:16px;margin:0;font-weight:900;">أنواع البيانات الشخصية المعروضة</h3>
        </div>
        <div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px;">${piiList}</div>
      </div>

      <!-- Evidence Screenshots -->
      ${screenshotSection ? `
      <div style="margin-bottom:28px;page-break-inside:avoid;">
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:16px;">
          <div style="width:4px;height:26px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#6366f1,#8b5cf6);border-radius:2px;"></div>
          <h3 style="color:#0a2540;font-size:16px;margin:0;font-weight:900;">لقطات الأدلة</h3>
        </div>
        <div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;">${screenshotSection}</div>
      </div>` : ""}

      <!-- AI Analysis -->
      ${aiSection}

      <!-- PDPL Analysis -->
      ${pdplSection}

      <!-- Sources -->
      ${sourcesSection}

    </div>

    <!-- VERIFICATION & QR CODE SECTION -->
    <div style="margin:0 36px;padding:26px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0a2540,#0c3054);border-radius:14px;position:relative;z-index:1;overflow:hidden;page-break-inside:avoid;">
      <div style="position:absolute;inset:0;opacity:0.03;background-image:repeating-linear-gradient(-45deg,transparent,transparent 20px,rgba(255,255,255,1) 20px,rgba(255,255,255,1) 21px);pointer-events:none;"></div>
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:20px;position:relative;z-index:1;">
        <div style="text-align:right;flex:1;min-width:250px;">
          <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:14px;">
            <div style="width:34px;height:34px;background:rgba(13,148,136,0.2);border-radius:8px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;">
              <span style="font-size:18px;color:#5eead4;">✓</span>
            </div>
            <h3 style="color:white;font-size:16px;margin:0;font-weight:900;">التحقق من صحة الوثيقة</h3>
          </div>
          <div style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.06);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12);border-radius:10px;padding:14px 18px;margin-bottom:12px;">
            <p style="font-size:9px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);margin:0;">كود التحقق</p>
            <p style="font-size:17px;color:#5eead4;font-family:'Courier New',monospace;font-weight:900;margin:5px 0 0 0;letter-spacing:1.5px;">${verificationCode}</p>
          </div>
          <div style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);border-radius:10px;padding:12px 18px;margin-bottom:12px;">
            <p style="font-size:9px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);margin:0;">بصمة المحتوى (SHA-256)</p>
            <p style="font-size:9px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.55);font-family:'Courier New',monospace;margin:5px 0 0 0;word-break:break-all;line-height:1.6;">${contentHash}</p>
          </div>
          <p style="font-size:10px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.35);margin:0;line-height:1.8;">
            امسح رمز QR أو أدخل كود التحقق في منصة راصد للتحقق من صحة ومصداقية هذه الوثيقة
          </p>
        </div>
        <div style="text-align:center;">
          <div style="background:white;border-radius:12px;padding:10px;display:inline-block;box-shadow:0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);">
            <img src="${qrDataUrl}" style="width:150px;height:150px;border-radius:6px;" />
          </div>
          <p style="font-size:9px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.3);margin-top:10px;">امسح للتحقق من صحة الوثيقة</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- LEGAL DISCLAIMER -->
    <div style="margin:24px 36px;padding:18px;background:#fef2f2;border:1px solid #fecaca;border-radius:10px;position:relative;z-index:1;page-break-inside:avoid;">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:start;gap:12px;">
        <div style="width:28px;height:28px;background:#dc26261a;border-radius:6px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:2px;">
          <span style="font-size:14px;color:#dc2626;">!</span>
        </div>
        <div>
          <p style="font-size:12px;color:#991b1b;font-weight:800;margin:0;">إخلاء مسؤولية وتحذير قانوني</p>
          <p style="font-size:10px;color:#7f1d1d;line-height:2;margin:8px 0 0 0;">
            هذه الوثيقة صادرة من منصة راصد التابعة لمكتب إدارة البيانات الوطنية وتحتوي على بيانات مصنفة. أي استخدام أو نسخ أو توزيع لهذه الوثيقة خارج نطاق المهام الرسمية المعتمدة يُعد مخالفة صريحة للأنظمة واللوائح المعمول بها ويستوجب المساءلة النظامية.
          </p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- FOOTER -->
    <div style="padding:22px 36px;text-align:center;position:relative;z-index:1;">
      <div style="width:100%;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#cbd5e1,transparent);margin-bottom:18px;"></div>
      <img src="${RASID_LOGO_LIGHT_BG}" alt="منصة راصد" style="height:36px;object-fit:contain;margin-bottom:10px;" />
      <p style="font-size:11px;color:#0d9488;font-weight:700;margin-top:10px;">❝ حماية البيانات الشخصية متطلب وطني ❞</p>
      <p style="font-size:9px;color:#94a3b8;margin-top:8px;">© ${new Date().getFullYear()} NDMO — جميع الحقوق محفوظة | هذه الوثيقة محمية بموجب نظام حماية البيانات الشخصية</p>
    </div>

    <!-- BOTTOM CLASSIFICATION BANNER -->
    <div style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#7f1d1d,#991b1b,#b91c1c);padding:10px 24px;text-align:center;position:relative;z-index:1;">
      <p style="color:#fecaca;font-size:12px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:4px;margin:0;">
        سري جداً — TOP SECRET — تصنيف: مقيّد
      </p>
    </div>

  </div>
</body>
</html>`;

  return {
    documentId,
    verificationCode,
    contentHash,
    htmlContent,
    incidentId: incident.id,
    title: incident.title_en,
    titleAr: incident.title_ar,
    generatedAt,
  };
}

```

---

## `server/atlasData.ts`

```typescript
/**
 * Atlas Breach Data — Server-side access for Smart Rasid AI
 * Reads from client/public/atlas_data.json (423 real Saudi breach incidents)
 * Falls back to database (leaks table) if JSON not available
 */
import fs from "fs";
import path from "path";
import { getLeaks } from "./db";

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// Types
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

interface AtlasIncident {
  id: string;
  title: string;
  titleEn: string;
  records: number;
  date: string;
  sector: string;
  sectorEn: string;
  source: string;
  severity: string;
  region: string;
  city: string;
  description: string;
  descriptionEn: string;
  piiTypes: string[];
  piiTypesEn: string[];
  status: string;
  threatActor: string;
  breachMethod: string;
  breachMethodEn: string;
  sourcePlatform: string;
  sourceUrl: string;
  price: string;
  imageUrls: string[];
  aiAnalysis: string;
  samples: string;
  evidenceUrls: Array<{ url: string; type: string; filename: string }>;
}

interface AtlasData {
  summary: {
    totalIncidents: number;
    totalRecords: number;
    totalPiiTypes: number;
    totalSectors: number;
    totalRegions: number;
    severityDistribution: Record<string, number>;
    sourceDistribution: Record<string, { count: number; records: number }>;
  };
  piiAtlas: any[];
  sectors: any[];
  patterns: Array<{
    id: string;
    source: string;
    severity: string;
    count: number;
    records: number;
    incidents: AtlasIncident[];
    [key: string]: any;
  }>;
  monthly: any[];
  regions: any[];
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// Data Loading — from atlas_data.json
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

let _cachedAtlasData: AtlasData | null = null;
let _cachedIncidents: AtlasIncident[] | null = null;

function loadAtlasData(): AtlasData | null {
  if (_cachedAtlasData) return _cachedAtlasData;
  try {
    // Try multiple paths
    const paths = [
      path.join(process.cwd(), "client", "public", "atlas_data.json"),
      path.join(process.cwd(), "dist", "public", "atlas_data.json"),
      path.join(process.cwd(), "public", "atlas_data.json"),
    ];
    for (const p of paths) {
      if (fs.existsSync(p)) {
        const raw = fs.readFileSync(p, "utf-8");
        _cachedAtlasData = JSON.parse(raw) as AtlasData;
        console.log(`[AtlasData] Loaded from ${p}`);
        return _cachedAtlasData;
      }
    }
    console.warn("[AtlasData] atlas_data.json not found in any path");
    return null;
  } catch (err) {
    console.error("[AtlasData] Failed to load atlas_data.json:", err);
    return null;
  }
}

function getAllIncidents(): AtlasIncident[] {
  if (_cachedIncidents) return _cachedIncidents;
  const data = loadAtlasData();
  if (!data) return [];
  
  // Extract all unique incidents from patterns
  const incidentMap = new Map<string, AtlasIncident>();
  for (const pattern of data.patterns) {
    for (const inc of pattern.incidents || []) {
      if (!incidentMap.has(inc.id)) {
        incidentMap.set(inc.id, inc);
      }
    }
  }
  _cachedIncidents = Array.from(incidentMap.values());
  console.log(`[AtlasData] Loaded ${_cachedIncidents.length} unique incidents`);
  return _cachedIncidents;
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// Query Atlas Breaches
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

export function queryAtlasBreaches(params: {
  sector?: string;
  severity?: string;
  platform?: string;
  threat_actor?: string;
  search?: string;
  limit?: number;
}): any {
  const incidents = getAllIncidents();
  if (incidents.length === 0) {
    return { error: "لم يتم تحميل بيانات الأطلس", total: 0, incidents: [] };
  }

  let filtered = [...incidents];

  if (params.sector) {
    const s = params.sector.toLowerCase();
    filtered = filtered.filter(i => 
      i.sector?.toLowerCase().includes(s) || 
      i.sectorEn?.toLowerCase().includes(s)
    );
  }
  if (params.severity) {
    const sev = params.severity.toLowerCase();
    filtered = filtered.filter(i => i.severity?.toLowerCase().includes(sev));
  }
  if (params.platform) {
    const p = params.platform.toLowerCase();
    filtered = filtered.filter(i => 
      i.sourcePlatform?.toLowerCase().includes(p) ||
      i.source?.toLowerCase().includes(p)
    );
  }
  if (params.threat_actor) {
    const ta = params.threat_actor.toLowerCase();
    filtered = filtered.filter(i => i.threatActor?.toLowerCase().includes(ta));
  }
  if (params.search) {
    const q = params.search.toLowerCase();
    filtered = filtered.filter(i =>
      i.title?.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
      i.titleEn?.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
      i.description?.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
      i.descriptionEn?.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
      i.id?.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
      i.threatActor?.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
      i.sector?.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
      i.samples?.toLowerCase().includes(q)
    );
  }

  // Sort by records descending
  filtered.sort((a, b) => (b.records || 0) - (a.records || 0));

  const limit = params.limit || 50;
  const limited = filtered.slice(0, limit);

  return {
    total: filtered.length,
    showing: limited.length,
    incidents: limited.map(i => ({
      id: i.id,
      title: i.title,
      titleEn: i.titleEn,
      records: i.records,
      date: i.date,
      sector: i.sector,
      sectorEn: i.sectorEn,
      source: i.source,
      severity: i.severity,
      region: i.region,
      city: i.city,
      description: i.description,
      descriptionEn: i.descriptionEn,
      piiTypes: i.piiTypes,
      piiTypesEn: i.piiTypesEn,
      status: i.status,
      threatActor: i.threatActor,
      breachMethod: i.breachMethod,
      breachMethodEn: i.breachMethodEn,
      sourcePlatform: i.sourcePlatform,
      sourceUrl: i.sourceUrl,
      price: i.price,
      imageUrls: i.imageUrls,
      evidenceUrls: i.evidenceUrls,
      // Include samples and AI analysis for full detail
      samples: i.samples,
      aiAnalysis: i.aiAnalysis,
    })),
  };
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// Get Atlas Breach Details — Full detail for a single incident
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

export function getAtlasBreachDetails(breachId: string): any {
  const incidents = getAllIncidents();
  
  // Smart search: by ID, or by name/keyword
  let incident = incidents.find(i => i.id === breachId);
  
  if (!incident) {
    // Try partial match
    const q = breachId.toLowerCase();
    incident = incidents.find(i => 
      i.id?.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
      i.title?.toLowerCase().includes(q) ||
      i.titleEn?.toLowerCase().includes(q)
    );
  }

  if (!incident) {
    return { error: `لم يتم العثور على حالة رصد بمعرّف: ${breachId}` };
  }

  return {
    id: incident.id,
    title: incident.title,
    titleEn: incident.titleEn,
    records: incident.records,
    date: incident.date,
    sector: incident.sector,
    sectorEn: incident.sectorEn,
    source: incident.source,
    severity: incident.severity,
    region: incident.region,
    city: incident.city,
    description: incident.description,
    descriptionEn: incident.descriptionEn,
    piiTypes: incident.piiTypes,
    piiTypesEn: incident.piiTypesEn,
    piiTypesCount: incident.piiTypes?.length || 0,
    status: incident.status,
    threatActor: incident.threatActor,
    breachMethod: incident.breachMethod,
    breachMethodEn: incident.breachMethodEn,
    sourcePlatform: incident.sourcePlatform,
    sourceUrl: incident.sourceUrl,
    price: incident.price,
    imageUrls: incident.imageUrls,
    evidenceUrls: incident.evidenceUrls,
    samples: incident.samples,
    aiAnalysis: incident.aiAnalysis,
  };
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// Get Atlas Stats — Comprehensive statistics
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

export function getAtlasStats(): any {
  const data = loadAtlasData();
  if (!data) return { error: "لم يتم تحميل بيانات الأطلس" };

  const incidents = getAllIncidents();

  // Build additional stats from incidents
  const bySector: Record<string, { count: number; records: number }> = {};
  const bySeverity: Record<string, { count: number; records: number }> = {};
  const bySource: Record<string, { count: number; records: number }> = {};
  const byThreatActor: Record<string, { count: number; records: number }> = {};
  const byRegion: Record<string, { count: number; records: number }> = {};
  const byBreachMethod: Record<string, number> = {};
  const allPiiTypes = new Set<string>();

  for (const inc of incidents) {
    // By sector
    const sec = inc.sector || "غير محدد";
    if (!bySector[sec]) bySector[sec] = { count: 0, records: 0 };
    bySector[sec].count++;
    bySector[sec].records += inc.records || 0;

    // By severity
    const sev = inc.severity || "غير محدد";
    if (!bySeverity[sev]) bySeverity[sev] = { count: 0, records: 0 };
    bySeverity[sev].count++;
    bySeverity[sev].records += inc.records || 0;

    // By source
    const src = inc.source || "غير محدد";
    if (!bySource[src]) bySource[src] = { count: 0, records: 0 };
    bySource[src].count++;
    bySource[src].records += inc.records || 0;

    // By threat actor
    const ta = inc.threatActor || "مجهول";
    if (!byThreatActor[ta]) byThreatActor[ta] = { count: 0, records: 0 };
    byThreatActor[ta].count++;
    byThreatActor[ta].records += inc.records || 0;

    // By region
    const reg = inc.region || "غير محدد";
    if (!byRegion[reg]) byRegion[reg] = { count: 0, records: 0 };
    byRegion[reg].count++;
    byRegion[reg].records += inc.records || 0;

    // By breach method
    const bm = inc.breachMethod || "غير محدد";
    byBreachMethod[bm] = (byBreachMethod[bm] || 0) + 1;

    // PII types
    (inc.piiTypes || []).forEach(t => allPiiTypes.add(t));
  }

  return {
    summary: data.summary,
    totalIncidents: incidents.length,
    totalRecords: incidents.reduce((sum, i) => sum + (i.records || 0), 0),
    totalPiiTypes: allPiiTypes.size,
    bySector: Object.entries(bySector).sort((a, b) => b[1].count - a[1].count),
    bySeverity,
    bySource,
    byThreatActor: Object.entries(byThreatActor).sort((a, b) => b[1].count - a[1].count).slice(0, 20),
    byRegion: Object.entries(byRegion).sort((a, b) => b[1].count - a[1].count),
    byBreachMethod: Object.entries(byBreachMethod).sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1]),
    piiAtlas: data.piiAtlas?.slice(0, 30),
    monthly: data.monthly,
    regions: data.regions,
  };
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// Analyze Atlas Trends
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

export function analyzeAtlasTrends(analysisType: string): any {
  const data = loadAtlasData();
  if (!data) return { error: "لم يتم تحميل بيانات الأطلس" };

  const incidents = getAllIncidents();

  switch (analysisType) {
    case "sector_comparison": {
      const sectors: Record<string, { count: number; records: number; severities: Record<string, number>; piiTypes: Set<string>; topIncidents: any[] }> = {};
      incidents.forEach(r => {
        const sec = r.sector || "غير محدد";
        if (!sectors[sec]) sectors[sec] = { count: 0, records: 0, severities: {}, piiTypes: new Set(), topIncidents: [] };
        sectors[sec].count++;
        sectors[sec].records += r.records || 0;
        const sev = r.severity || "غير محدد";
        sectors[sec].severities[sev] = (sectors[sec].severities[sev] || 0) + 1;
        (r.piiTypes || []).forEach(t => sectors[sec].piiTypes.add(t));
        if (sectors[sec].topIncidents.length < 3) {
          sectors[sec].topIncidents.push({ id: r.id, title: r.title, records: r.records });
        }
      });
      const result = Object.entries(sectors).map(([name, info]) => ({
        name,
        count: info.count,
        records: info.records,
        severities: info.severities,
        piiTypes: Array.from(info.piiTypes),
        topIncidents: info.topIncidents,
      })).sort((a, b) => b.count - a.count);
      return { analysis: "مقارنة القطاعات", sectors: result };
    }

    case "timeline": {
      const monthly: Record<string, { count: number; records: number; critical: number; incidents: any[] }> = {};
      incidents.forEach(r => {
        if (r.date) {
          const month = r.date.substring(0, 7);
          if (!monthly[month]) monthly[month] = { count: 0, records: 0, critical: 0, incidents: [] };
          monthly[month].count++;
          monthly[month].records += r.records || 0;
          if (r.severity === "واسع النطاق" || r.severity === "مرتفع") monthly[month].critical++;
          if (monthly[month].incidents.length < 3) {
            monthly[month].incidents.push({ id: r.id, title: r.title, records: r.records });
          }
        }
      });
      return { analysis: "التطور الزمني", monthly };
    }

    case "threat_actors": {
      const actors: Record<string, { count: number; sectors: Set<string>; platforms: Set<string>; totalRecords: number; topIncidents: any[] }> = {};
      incidents.forEach(r => {
        const actor = r.threatActor || "مجهول";
        if (!actors[actor]) actors[actor] = { count: 0, sectors: new Set(), platforms: new Set(), totalRecords: 0, topIncidents: [] };
        actors[actor].count++;
        if (r.sector) actors[actor].sectors.add(r.sector);
        if (r.sourcePlatform) actors[actor].platforms.add(r.sourcePlatform);
        actors[actor].totalRecords += r.records || 0;
        if (actors[actor].topIncidents.length < 3) {
          actors[actor].topIncidents.push({ id: r.id, title: r.title, records: r.records });
        }
      });
      const result = Object.entries(actors).map(([name, info]) => ({
        name,
        count: info.count,
        sectors: Array.from(info.sectors),
        platforms: Array.from(info.platforms),
        totalRecords: info.totalRecords,
        topIncidents: info.topIncidents,
      })).sort((a, b) => b.count - a.count);
      return { analysis: "تحليل المهاجمين", actors: result };
    }

    case "data_types": {
      const types: Record<string, { count: number; sectors: Set<string>; records: number }> = {};
      incidents.forEach(r => {
        (r.piiTypes || []).forEach((dt: string) => {
          if (!types[dt]) types[dt] = { count: 0, sectors: new Set(), records: 0 };
          types[dt].count++;
          if (r.sector) types[dt].sectors.add(r.sector);
          types[dt].records += r.records || 0;
        });
      });
      const result = Object.entries(types).map(([type, info]) => ({
        type,
        count: info.count,
        sectors: Array.from(info.sectors),
        totalRecords: info.records,
      })).sort((a, b) => b.count - a.count);
      return { analysis: "تحليل أنواع البيانات المعروضة", data_types: result };
    }

    case "severity_distribution": {
      const dist: Record<string, { count: number; totalRecords: number; sectors: string[]; topIncidents: any[] }> = {};
      incidents.forEach(r => {
        const sev = r.severity || "غير محدد";
        if (!dist[sev]) dist[sev] = { count: 0, totalRecords: 0, sectors: [], topIncidents: [] };
        dist[sev].count++;
        dist[sev].totalRecords += r.records || 0;
        if (r.sector && !dist[sev].sectors.includes(r.sector)) dist[sev].sectors.push(r.sector);
        if (dist[sev].topIncidents.length < 3) {
          dist[sev].topIncidents.push({ id: r.id, title: r.title, records: r.records });
        }
      });
      return { analysis: "توزيع مستوى التأثير", distribution: dist };
    }

    case "platform_analysis": {
      const platforms: Record<string, { count: number; actors: Set<string>; sectors: Set<string>; records: number }> = {};
      incidents.forEach(r => {
        const p = r.sourcePlatform || r.source || "غير محدد";
        if (!platforms[p]) platforms[p] = { count: 0, actors: new Set(), sectors: new Set(), records: 0 };
        platforms[p].count++;
        if (r.threatActor) platforms[p].actors.add(r.threatActor);
        if (r.sector) platforms[p].sectors.add(r.sector);
        platforms[p].records += r.records || 0;
      });
      const result = Object.entries(platforms).map(([name, info]) => ({
        name,
        count: info.count,
        actors: Array.from(info.actors),
        sectors: Array.from(info.sectors),
        totalRecords: info.records,
      })).sort((a, b) => b.count - a.count);
      return { analysis: "تحليل المنصات", platforms: result };
    }

    case "pdpl_impact": {
      // Analyze PDPL violations from AI analysis text
      let totalWithAnalysis = 0;
      const severityImpact: Record<string, number> = {};
      incidents.forEach(r => {
        if (r.aiAnalysis) totalWithAnalysis++;
        const sev = r.severity || "غير محدد";
        severityImpact[sev] = (severityImpact[sev] || 0) + (r.records || 0);
      });
      return { 
        analysis: "تأثير نظام PDPL", 
        totalIncidents: incidents.length,
        incidentsWithAIAnalysis: totalWithAnalysis,
        severityImpact,
        totalRecordsExposed: incidents.reduce((sum, i) => sum + (i.records || 0), 0),
      };
    }

    case "region_analysis": {
      const regions: Record<string, { count: number; records: number; sectors: Set<string>; cities: Set<string> }> = {};
      incidents.forEach(r => {
        const reg = r.region || "غير محدد";
        if (!regions[reg]) regions[reg] = { count: 0, records: 0, sectors: new Set(), cities: new Set() };
        regions[reg].count++;
        regions[reg].records += r.records || 0;
        if (r.sector) regions[reg].sectors.add(r.sector);
        if (r.city) regions[reg].cities.add(r.city);
      });
      const result = Object.entries(regions).map(([name, info]) => ({
        name,
        count: info.count,
        records: info.records,
        sectors: Array.from(info.sectors),
        cities: Array.from(info.cities),
      })).sort((a, b) => b.count - a.count);
      return { analysis: "تحليل المناطق الجغرافية", regions: result };
    }

    default:
      return { error: `نوع تحليل غير معروف: ${analysisType}. الأنواع المتاحة: sector_comparison, timeline, threat_actors, data_types, severity_distribution, platform_analysis, pdpl_impact, region_analysis` };
  }
}

```

## `server/atlasRouter.ts`

```typescript
/**
 * Atlas Router — Generates atlas_data compatible JSON from the live database
 * This bridges rasid-leaks DB data to the atlas visualization pages
 */
import { router, publicProcedure } from "./_core/trpc";
import * as db from "./db";

// Arabic severity mapping
const SEVERITY_AR: Record<string, string> = {
  critical: "حرج",
  high: "مرتفع",
  medium: "متوسط",
  low: "منخفض",
};

const SEVERITY_SUMMARY: Record<string, string> = {
  critical: "واسع النطاق",
  high: "مرتفع",
  medium: "متوسط",
  low: "محدود",
};

const SOURCE_AR: Record<string, string> = {
  telegram: "تليجرام",
  darkweb: "دارك ويب",
  paste: "مواقع اللصق",
};

export const atlasRouter = router({
  /** Get full atlas data for visualization pages */
  getAtlasData: publicProcedure.query(async () => {
    let allLeaks: any[] = [];
    try {
      allLeaks = await db.getLeaks();
    } catch {
      // If DB fails, return empty structure
      return getEmptyAtlasData();
    }

    if (!allLeaks || allLeaks.length === 0) {
      return getEmptyAtlasData();
    }

    // === SUMMARY ===
    const totalIncidents = allLeaks.length;
    const totalRecords = allLeaks.reduce((s: number, l: any) => s + (l.recordCount || 0), 0);

    // PII types
    const piiSet = new Set<string>();
    allLeaks.forEach((l: any) => {
      const types = l.piiTypesAr || l.piiTypes || [];
      if (Array.isArray(types)) types.forEach((t: string) => piiSet.add(t));
    });
    const totalPiiTypes = piiSet.size;

    // Sectors
    const sectorMap = new Map<string, { count: number; records: number; sources: Record<string, number>; severities: Record<string, number>; piiTypes: Set<string>; regions: Set<string> }>();
    allLeaks.forEach((l: any) => {
      const s = l.sectorAr || l.sector || "غير محدد";
      if (!sectorMap.has(s)) {
        sectorMap.set(s, { count: 0, records: 0, sources: {}, severities: {}, piiTypes: new Set(), regions: new Set() });
      }
      const entry = sectorMap.get(s)!;
      entry.count++;
      entry.records += l.recordCount || 0;
      const src = SOURCE_AR[l.source] || l.source || "غير معروف";
      entry.sources[src] = (entry.sources[src] || 0) + 1;
      const sev = SEVERITY_AR[l.severity] || l.severity || "غير محدد";
      entry.severities[sev] = (entry.severities[sev] || 0) + 1;
      const pii = l.piiTypesAr || l.piiTypes || [];
      if (Array.isArray(pii)) pii.forEach((t: string) => entry.piiTypes.add(t));
      if (l.regionAr || l.region) entry.regions.add(l.regionAr || l.region);
    });
    const totalSectors = sectorMap.size;

    // Regions
    const regionMap = new Map<string, { count: number; records: number }>();
    allLeaks.forEach((l: any) => {
      const r = l.regionAr || l.region || "غير محدد";
      if (!regionMap.has(r)) regionMap.set(r, { count: 0, records: 0 });
      const entry = regionMap.get(r)!;
      entry.count++;
      entry.records += l.recordCount || 0;
    });
    const totalRegions = regionMap.size;

    // Severity distribution
    const sevDist: Record<string, number> = {};
    allLeaks.forEach((l: any) => {
      const s = SEVERITY_SUMMARY[l.severity] || l.severity || "غير محدد";
      sevDist[s] = (sevDist[s] || 0) + 1;
    });

    // Source distribution
    const srcDist: Record<string, { count: number; records: number }> = {};
    allLeaks.forEach((l: any) => {
      const s = SOURCE_AR[l.source] || l.source || "غير معروف";
      if (!srcDist[s]) srcDist[s] = { count: 0, records: 0 };
      srcDist[s].count++;
      srcDist[s].records += l.recordCount || 0;
    });

    const summary = {
      totalIncidents,
      totalRecords,
      totalPiiTypes,
      totalSectors,
      totalRegions,
      severityDistribution: sevDist,
      sourceDistribution: srcDist,
    };

    // === PII ATLAS ===
    const piiDetailMap = new Map<string, {
      name: string; nameAr: string; count: number; sensitivity: string;
      topSectors: Map<string, number>; sourceDistribution: Record<string, number>;
      severityDistribution: Record<string, number>;
    }>();

    allLeaks.forEach((l: any) => {
      const piiAr = l.piiTypesAr || [];
      const piiEn = l.piiTypes || [];
      const types = Array.isArray(piiAr) && piiAr.length > 0 ? piiAr : (Array.isArray(piiEn) ? piiEn : []);
      const typesEn = Array.isArray(piiEn) ? piiEn : [];

      types.forEach((t: string, idx: number) => {
        if (!piiDetailMap.has(t)) {
          piiDetailMap.set(t, {
            name: typesEn[idx] || t,
            nameAr: t,
            count: 0,
            sensitivity: l.severity === "critical" || l.severity === "high" ? "high" : l.severity === "medium" ? "medium" : "low",
            topSectors: new Map(),
            sourceDistribution: {},
            severityDistribution: {},
          });
        }
        const entry = piiDetailMap.get(t)!;
        entry.count++;
        const sector = l.sectorAr || l.sector || "غير محدد";
        entry.topSectors.set(sector, (entry.topSectors.get(sector) || 0) + 1);
        const src = SOURCE_AR[l.source] || l.source || "غير معروف";
        entry.sourceDistribution[src] = (entry.sourceDistribution[src] || 0) + 1;
        const sev = SEVERITY_AR[l.severity] || l.severity || "غير محدد";
        entry.severityDistribution[sev] = (entry.severityDistribution[sev] || 0) + 1;
      });
    });

    const piiAtlas = Array.from(piiDetailMap.values()).map(p => ({
      name: p.name,
      nameAr: p.nameAr,
      count: p.count,
      sensitivity: p.sensitivity as "high" | "medium" | "low",
      topSectors: Array.from(p.topSectors.entries())
        .map(([sector, count]) => ({ sector, count }))
        .sort((a, b) => b.count - a.count)
        .slice(0, 10),
      sourceDistribution: p.sourceDistribution,
      severityDistribution: p.severityDistribution,
    })).sort((a, b) => b.count - a.count);

    // === SECTORS ===
    const sectors = Array.from(sectorMap.entries()).map(([name, v]) => ({
      name,
      count: v.count,
      records: v.records,
      sources: v.sources,
      severities: v.severities,
      piiTypes: Array.from(v.piiTypes),
      regions: Array.from(v.regions),
    })).sort((a, b) => b.count - a.count);

    // === PATTERNS (Source x Severity matrix) ===
    const patternMap = new Map<string, {
      source: string; sourceKey: string; severity: string; severityKey: string;
      count: number; records: number; sectors: Set<string>; piiTypes: Set<string>;
      incidents: any[];
    }>();

    allLeaks.forEach((l: any) => {
      const src = SOURCE_AR[l.source] || l.source || "غير معروف";
      const srcKey = l.source || "unknown";
      const sev = SEVERITY_SUMMARY[l.severity] || l.severity || "غير محدد";
      const sevKey = l.severity || "unknown";
      const key = `${srcKey}-${sevKey}`;

      if (!patternMap.has(key)) {
        patternMap.set(key, {
          source: src, sourceKey: srcKey, severity: sev, severityKey: sevKey,
          count: 0, records: 0, sectors: new Set(), piiTypes: new Set(), incidents: [],
        });
      }
      const entry = patternMap.get(key)!;
      entry.count++;
      entry.records += l.recordCount || 0;
      entry.sectors.add(l.sectorAr || l.sector || "غير محدد");
      const pii = l.piiTypesAr || l.piiTypes || [];
      if (Array.isArray(pii)) pii.forEach((t: string) => entry.piiTypes.add(t));

      entry.incidents.push({
        id: l.leakId || `LK-${l.id}`,
        title: l.titleAr || l.title,
        titleEn: l.title,
        records: l.recordCount || 0,
        date: l.detectedAt || l.createdAt,
        sector: l.sectorAr || l.sector,
        sectorEn: l.sector,
        source: src,
        severity: SEVERITY_AR[l.severity] || l.severity,
        region: l.regionAr || l.region || "غير محدد",
        city: l.cityAr || l.city || "",
        description: l.descriptionAr || l.description || "",
        descriptionEn: l.description || "",
        piiTypes: Array.isArray(l.piiTypesAr) ? l.piiTypesAr : (Array.isArray(l.piiTypes) ? l.piiTypes : []),
        piiTypesEn: Array.isArray(l.piiTypes) ? l.piiTypes : [],
        status: l.status || "new",
        threatActor: l.threatActor || "",
        breachMethod: l.breachMethodAr || l.breachMethod || "",
        breachMethodEn: l.breachMethod || "",
        sourcePlatform: l.sourcePlatform || "",
        sourceUrl: l.sourceUrl || "",
        price: l.leakPrice || "",
        imageUrls: l.screenshotUrls || [],
        aiAnalysis: typeof l.aiAnalysis === "object" ? JSON.stringify(l.aiAnalysis) : (l.aiSummaryAr || l.aiSummary || ""),
        samples: typeof l.sampleData === "object" ? JSON.stringify(l.sampleData) : "",
        evidenceUrls: l.evidenceFiles || [],
        totalSampleRecords: l.totalSampleRecords || 0,
      });
    });

    const patterns = Array.from(patternMap.values()).map((p, idx) => ({
      id: `P-${idx + 1}`,
      source: p.source,
      sourceKey: p.sourceKey,
      severity: p.severity,
      severityKey: p.severityKey,
      count: p.count,
      records: p.records,
      sectorCount: p.sectors.size,
      sectors: Array.from(p.sectors),
      piiTypes: Array.from(p.piiTypes),
      topIncidents: p.incidents.slice(0, 5).map(i => ({
        id: i.id, title: i.title, records: i.records, date: i.date, sector: i.sector,
      })),
      incidents: p.incidents,
    })).sort((a, b) => b.count - a.count);

    // === MONTHLY ===
    const monthMap = new Map<string, { count: number; records: number }>();
    allLeaks.forEach((l: any) => {
      const d = l.detectedAt ? new Date(l.detectedAt) : new Date(l.createdAt);
      const key = `${d.getFullYear()}-${String(d.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, "0")}`;
      if (!monthMap.has(key)) monthMap.set(key, { count: 0, records: 0 });
      const entry = monthMap.get(key)!;
      entry.count++;
      entry.records += l.recordCount || 0;
    });
    const monthly = Array.from(monthMap.entries())
      .sort(([a], [b]) => a.localeCompare(b))
      .map(([month, v]) => ({ month, count: v.count, records: v.records }));

    // === REGIONS ===
    const regions = Array.from(regionMap.entries())
      .map(([name, v]) => ({ name, count: v.count, records: v.records }))
      .sort((a, b) => b.count - a.count);

    return { summary, piiAtlas, sectors, patterns, monthly, regions };
  }),
});

function getEmptyAtlasData() {
  return {
    summary: {
      totalIncidents: 0, totalRecords: 0, totalPiiTypes: 0,
      totalSectors: 0, totalRegions: 0,
      severityDistribution: {}, sourceDistribution: {},
    },
    piiAtlas: [],
    sectors: [],
    patterns: [],
    monthly: [],
    regions: [],
  };
}

```

## `server/auth.logout.test.ts`

```typescript
import { describe, expect, it } from "vitest";
import { appRouter } from "./routers";
import { COOKIE_NAME } from "../shared/const";
import type { TrpcContext } from "./_core/context";

type CookieCall = {
  name: string;
  options: Record<string, unknown>;
};

type AuthenticatedUser = NonNullable<TrpcContext["user"]>;

function createAuthContext(): { ctx: TrpcContext; clearedCookies: CookieCall[] } {
  const clearedCookies: CookieCall[] = [];

  const user: AuthenticatedUser = {
    id: 1,
    openId: "sample-user",
    email: "sample@example.com",
    name: "Sample User",
    loginMethod: "manus",
    role: "user",
    createdAt: new Date(),
    updatedAt: new Date(),
    lastSignedIn: new Date(),
  };

  const ctx: TrpcContext = {
    user,
    req: {
      protocol: "https",
      headers: {},
    } as TrpcContext["req"],
    res: {
      clearCookie: (name: string, options: Record<string, unknown>) => {
        clearedCookies.push({ name, options });
      },
    } as TrpcContext["res"],
  };

  return { ctx, clearedCookies };
}

describe("auth.logout", () => {
  it("clears the session cookie and reports success", async () => {
    const { ctx, clearedCookies } = createAuthContext();
    const caller = appRouter.createCaller(ctx);

    const result = await caller.auth.logout();

    expect(result).toEqual({ success: true });
    expect(clearedCookies).toHaveLength(1);
    expect(clearedCookies[0]?.name).toBe(COOKIE_NAME);
    expect(clearedCookies[0]?.options).toMatchObject({
      maxAge: -1,
      secure: true,
      sameSite: "none",
      httpOnly: true,
      path: "/",
    });
  });
});

```

## `server/chartGenerator.ts`

```typescript
/**
 * Chart Generator — DLV-02-03-007
 * وحدة رسم المخططات البيانية من جهة الخادم باستخدام chart.js + canvas
 * تنشئ صور PNG عالية الجودة وتخزنها في /tmp/rasid-charts/
 */
import fs from "fs";
import path from "path";
import crypto from "crypto";

// ─── المسار المؤقت لتخزين الرسوم — DLV-02-03-010 ─────────────────
const CHARTS_DIR = "/tmp/rasid-charts";

function ensureChartsDir(): void {
  if (!fs.existsSync(CHARTS_DIR)) {
    fs.mkdirSync(CHARTS_DIR, { recursive: true });
  }
}

// ─── ألوان راصد الرسمية — DLV-02-02-005 ────────────────────────────
const RASID_COLORS = [
  "rgba(14, 165, 233, 0.8)",   // أزرق سماوي
  "rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.8)",   // أخضر زمردي
  "rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.8)",   // أصفر كهرماني
  "rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.8)",    // أحمر
  "rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.8)",   // بنفسجي
  "rgba(236, 72, 153, 0.8)",   // وردي
  "rgba(20, 184, 166, 0.8)",   // أخضر مائي
  "rgba(251, 146, 60, 0.8)",   // برتقالي
  "rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.8)",   // أزرق
  "rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.8)",   // أرجواني
  "rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.8)",    // أخضر
  "rgba(244, 63, 94, 0.8)",    // وردي داكن
];

const RASID_BORDERS = RASID_COLORS.map(c => c.replace("0.8)", "1)"));

// ─── أنواع المخططات المدعومة (12 نوع) — DLV-01-02-006 ─────────────
export type SupportedChartType =
  | "bar" | "line" | "pie" | "doughnut" | "radar"
  | "polarArea" | "scatter" | "bubble"
  | "horizontalBar" | "area" | "stackedBar" | "groupedBar";

export interface ChartGeneratorInput {
  type: SupportedChartType;
  title: string;
  labels: string[];
  datasets: Array<{
    label: string;
    data: number[];
    backgroundColor?: string[];
    borderColor?: string[];
  }>;
  width?: number;
  height?: number;
  rtl?: boolean;
}

export interface ChartGeneratorOutput {
  chartId: string;
  filePath: string;
  publicUrl: string;
  pngBuffer: Buffer;
  width: number;
  height: number;
}

/**
 * إنشاء رسم بياني PNG من جهة الخادم — DLV-02-01-001
 */
export async function generateChartPNG(input: ChartGeneratorInput): Promise<ChartGeneratorOutput> {
  ensureChartsDir();

  const { ChartJSNodeCanvas } = await import("chartjs-node-canvas");

  const width = input.width || 800;
  const height = input.height || 500;

  const chartJSNodeCanvas = new ChartJSNodeCanvas({
    width,
    height,
    backgroundColour: "#0f172a", // خلفية داكنة تتناسب مع ثيم راصد
    plugins: {
      requireLegacy: ["chartjs-plugin-datalabels"],
    },
  });

  // تحويل النوع لـ chart.js
  let chartType: string = input.type;
  if (chartType === "horizontalBar") chartType = "bar";
  if (chartType === "area") chartType = "line";
  if (chartType === "stackedBar") chartType = "bar";
  if (chartType === "groupedBar") chartType = "bar";

  const datasets = input.datasets.map((ds, idx) => ({
    label: ds.label,
    data: ds.data,
    backgroundColor: ds.backgroundColor || RASID_COLORS.slice(0, ds.data.length),
    borderColor: ds.borderColor || RASID_BORDERS.slice(0, ds.data.length),
    borderWidth: 1,
    ...(input.type === "area" ? { fill: true } : {}),
  }));

  const config: any = {
    type: chartType,
    data: {
      labels: input.labels,
      datasets,
    },
    options: {
      responsive: false,
      indexAxis: input.type === "horizontalBar" ? "y" : "x",
      plugins: {
        title: {
          display: true,
          text: input.title,
          color: "#e2e8f0",
          font: { size: 18, weight: "bold", family: "Tajawal, Arial" },
        },
        legend: {
          position: "bottom",
          labels: {
            color: "#94a3b8",
            font: { size: 12, family: "Tajawal, Arial" },
          },
        },
      },
      scales: ["pie", "doughnut", "polarArea", "radar"].includes(chartType)
        ? undefined
        : {
            x: {
              ticks: { color: "#94a3b8", font: { family: "Tajawal, Arial" } },
              grid: { color: "rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.1)" },
            },
            y: {
              ticks: { color: "#94a3b8", font: { family: "Tajawal, Arial" } },
              grid: { color: "rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.1)" },
            },
          },
      ...(input.type === "stackedBar"
        ? { scales: { x: { stacked: true }, y: { stacked: true } } }
        : {}),
    },
  };

  // إنشاء الصورة — DLV-02-01-001
  const pngBuffer = await chartJSNodeCanvas.renderToBuffer(config);

  // حفظ في /tmp/rasid-charts/ — DLV-02-03-010
  const hash = crypto.randomBytes(6).toString("hex");
  const chartId = `chart_${input.type}_${Date.now()}_${hash}`;
  const filePath = path.join(CHARTS_DIR, `${chartId}.png`);
  fs.writeFileSync(filePath, pngBuffer);

  // نسخ إلى public أيضاً
  const publicDir = path.join(process.cwd(), "public", "uploads", "charts");
  if (!fs.existsSync(publicDir)) fs.mkdirSync(publicDir, { recursive: true });
  const publicPath = path.join(publicDir, `${chartId}.png`);
  fs.writeFileSync(publicPath, pngBuffer);

  return {
    chartId,
    filePath,
    publicUrl: `/uploads/charts/${chartId}.png`,
    pngBuffer,
    width,
    height,
  };
}

/**
 * إنشاء رسم بياني سريع من بيانات بسيطة
 */
export async function quickChart(
  type: SupportedChartType,
  title: string,
  labels: string[],
  data: number[]
): Promise<ChartGeneratorOutput> {
  return generateChartPNG({
    type,
    title,
    labels,
    datasets: [{ label: title, data }],
  });
}

/**
 * تنظيف الرسوم القديمة
 */
export function cleanupCharts(maxAgeHours: number = 24): number {
  ensureChartsDir();
  const cutoff = Date.now() - maxAgeHours * 60 * 60 * 1000;
  const files = fs.readdirSync(CHARTS_DIR).filter(f => f.endsWith(".png"));
  let deleted = 0;
  for (const file of files) {
    try {
      const stat = fs.statSync(path.join(CHARTS_DIR, file));
      if (stat.mtimeMs < cutoff) {
        fs.unlinkSync(path.join(CHARTS_DIR, file));
        deleted++;
      }
    } catch { /* skip */ }
  }
  return deleted;
}

/**
 * قائمة الرسوم المحفوظة
 */
export function listSavedCharts(): Array<{ chartId: string; filePath: string; createdAt: Date }> {
  ensureChartsDir();
  return fs.readdirSync(CHARTS_DIR)
    .filter(f => f.endsWith(".png"))
    .map(f => ({
      chartId: f.replace(".png", ""),
      filePath: path.join(CHARTS_DIR, f),
      createdAt: fs.statSync(path.join(CHARTS_DIR, f)).mtime,
    }))
    .sort((a, b) => b.createdAt.getTime() - a.createdAt.getTime());
}

```
